system.description:
I may be a burglar... but I’m an honest one, I hope, more or less.

– J.R.R. Tolkien, The Hobbit

Back-alley urchins, gutterborn scum, shadowborn assassins. To hammers, every problem looks like a nail. Rogues are blades, and every problem is a throat.

Iconic Rogues

  • Locke Lamora, Gentleman Bastard Sequence
  • Nona Grey, The Book of the Ancestor
  • Vin, Mistborn

Playing Rogue

Rogues are low defense, midline harassers that focus on one single, deadly shot. They are given Features that reinforce attempting to gain Favor on their Attacks.

Action: Attack
Move: Midline
Starting Pack: Assassin, Conman, Investigator, or Scout
Key Stat: Dexterity or Awareness, Luck
Complexity: ★★★☆☆

Training

Weapons: Ranged
Skills: Finesse and Sneak, and 3 others

levelFeatures.name: Sneak Attack
levelFeatures.description:
If your first attack on a Turn is Favored, it deals an extra d4 damage and ignores an amount of Armor equal to this number of extra dice.

The number of extra d4s increases by 1 every 3 Rogue Levels hereafter.

levelFeatures.name: Infiltrator
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Resourceful Perk (p. 71), and you have Favor on Checks and Saves made to ambush and against traps that you are aware of.

levelFeatures.name: Unflinching Luck (d12)
levelFeatures.description: When you spend Luck to gain Favor on a Check, roll a d12. If the result is lower than your remaining Luck, the Luck is not spent. When you become an 8th Level Rogue, the d12 is a d10.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Evasive
levelFeatures.description: Your Reflex Saves can't be Hindered while you aren't Incapacitated, and you ignore two of a Dodged attack's damage dice on a passed Save, rather than one.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Lethal Weapon
levelFeatures.description: Your Sneak Attack applies to any Favored attacks you make on a Turn, not just the first.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Unflinching Luck (d10)
levelFeatures.description: This feature modifies the effect of Unflinching Luck. When you spend Luck to gain Favor on a Check, roll a d10. If the result is lower than your remaining Luck, the Luck is not spent.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Waylay
levelFeatures.description: Once per Round, if you kill an Enemy during a Turn, you can immediately take one Action.
